messages.content:
I'll start by loading the `execution-trace` skill first as required.

Now loading the `report-analyzer` skill:





Now I will analyze the lab report PDF from the URL `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584208613069366788Document_2.pdf` and apply the BloomCell clinical framework to produce the 8 structured records.

Based on the report-analyzer skill and BloomCell framework analysis of the uploaded lab report (Document_2.pdf), applying the 4-step BloomCell diagnostic sequence across blood sugar & iron, metabolic & stress, inflammation & immune, and deficiency & absorption domains, here are the 8 structured analysis objects generated:



Storing **Record 1 of 8** — Internal Notes Highlight:✅ Record 1 saved. Storing **Record 2 of 8** — Internal Notes Note:✅ Record 2 saved. Storing **Record 3 of 8** — Understanding Your Results Highlight:✅ Record 3 saved. Storing **Record 4 of 8** — Understanding Your Results Note:✅ Record 4 saved. Storing **Record 5 of 8** — Priority Actions Highlight:✅ Record 5 saved. Storing **Record 6 of 8** — Priority Actions Note:✅ Record 6 saved. Storing **Record 7 of 8** — Long-Term Strategy Highlight:✅ Record 7 saved. Storing **Record 8 of 8** — Long-Term Strategy Note:



8 records saved successfully.
